query:
query Customers($where: CustomerWhereInput, $orderBy: OrderByInput, $skip: Int, $limit: Int) {
  customers(where: $where, orderBy: $orderBy, skip: $skip, limit: $limit) {
    data {
      id_list
      profile_img
      full_name
      gender
      start_work_time
      status
      contact_info
      address
      village
      Bank_KIP
      BANK_THB
      BANK_USD
      BANK_NAME
      ip_address
      staff_branch_id
      isActive
      district {
        id_list
        title
      }
      state {
        id_state
        provinceName
      }
      fileCard
      fileBankKIP
      fileBankTHB
      fileBankUSD
      isVerify
      type_bank
      remark_reject
      change_phone
    }
  }
}
